ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "application_id" TEXT /* Unique application ID provided to the candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate (M, F, O) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the candidate (e.g., OPEN, SC, ST, OBC) */,
  "pwd_def" TEXT /* Indicates if the candidate is PWD (Person with Disability) or DEF (Differently-Abled) */,
  "merit_no" INTEGER /* Merit number assigned to the candidate */,
  "marks" TEXT /* Marks obtained by the candidate (in percentage) */,
  "candidate_sub_group" INTEGER /* Sub-group identifier for the candidate */,
  "seat_type" TEXT /* Type of seat for which the candidate is applying (e.g., GOPEN, LOPEN) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the candidate's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the candidate's record was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "preferred_programs" TEXT /* List of preferred programs for the candidate (JSON array) */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, reviewed, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_seat_type FOREIGN KEY ("seat_type") REFERENCES seat_types ("seat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., OPEN, SC, ST, OBC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the category */,
  "quota" TEXT /* Percentage or number of seats reserved for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seat_types" (
  "seat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat type */,
  "seat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the seat type (e.g., GOPEN, LOPEN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seat type */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the seat type */,
  "quota" TEXT /* Percentage or number of seats reserved for the seat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who submitted the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., mark sheet, identity proof) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., uploaded, verified, rejected) */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the document */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_documents_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_documents_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merit_lists" (
  "merit_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merit list */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program for which the merit list is generated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for which the merit list is generated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the merit list */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available for the program and category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the merit list was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the merit list was last updated */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program for which the merit list is generated (redundant but useful for quick queries) */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category for which the merit list is generated (redundant but useful for quick queries) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the merit list (e.g., generated, published, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merit_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merit_lists_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merit_lists_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the program was last updated */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Fees for the program */,
  "admission_criteria" TEXT /* Specific admission criteria for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seat_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat allocation */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate to whom the seat is allocated */,
  "merit_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merit list from which the seat is allocated */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program for which the seat is allocated */,
  "allocated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the seat was allocated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the seat allocation (e.g., allocated, pending, canceled) */,
  "confirmed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the seat allocation was confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seat_allocations_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seat_allocations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seat_allocations_merit_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("merit_list_id") REFERENCES merit_lists ("merit_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, counselor, candidate) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential or office address of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role (e.g., for new users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate to whom the communication is sent */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., application status, merit list update, seat allocation) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the communication */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the communication was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the communication was read by the candidate */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
